title: Sanctus Reach: Blood on the Mountain

curation.synopsis: The Red Waaagh! has fallen upon the Knight world of Alaric Prime, and its defenders are dying in their thousands beneath the green tide. Then the sons of Fenris arrive. A lone pack of Space Wolves, led by the Rune Priest Ulli Iceclaw, is given a desperate task: scale the Sacred Mountain and destroy the Ork factory churning out the aircraft that rain death on the armies below. Cut off from his brothers, hunted across the heights by a relentless foe, and haunted by visions he cannot escape, Iceclaw must confront his own fears as surely as the greenskins if he is to see the mission done. A grim tale of duty, isolation and the long climb toward an almost certain death.
